sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: The RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork class, implemented in Cython, represents a specific implementation of a Recursive Graph Neural Network (RGNN) model within the AnalysisG framework. It inherits from the generic ModelTemplate class, extending its functionalities to incorporate features and structures relevant to the RGNN architecture. This class provides a high-performance interface to an underlying C++ RGNN model, enabling efficient training and inference for hierarchical graph-based data.

sect1.title: The RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork Class
sect1.para: RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork is a cdef class, indicating its implementation as a Cython extension type. It inherits from ModelTemplate, thereby gaining all the base functionalities for managing input/output graph features, device settings, and checkpoint paths. Its primary role is to encapsulate a C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object, which likely contains the core RGNN model logic and parameters.

listitem.para: __cinit__(self): The Cython "constructor" equivalent, called during object allocation. It initializes a new C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object with default parameters (1024, 0.1) and assigns its pointer to self.rnn. It then assigns self.rnn to self.nn_ptr, allowing RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork to be treated as a generic ModelTemplate while still managing its specialized C++ object.
__init__(self): The standard Python initializer. This method is intentionally left empty, as initialization logic is handled by __cinit__ and the underlying C++ object.

__dealloc__(self): The Cython "destructor" equivalent, called upon object deallocation. It deallocates the C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object pointed to by self.nn_ptr (which is self.rnn), ensuring proper memory management for the specialized model.

sect2.title: Properties
sect2.para: These properties provide controlled access to specific parameters and configurations of the Recursive Graph Neural Network model.

listitem.para: @property dx -> int: Gets and sets the _dx parameter of the underlying C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object. This likely relates to the dimension of the node features.
@property x -> int: Gets and sets the _x parameter of the underlying C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object. This likely relates to the input feature dimension.
@property output -> int: Gets and sets the _output parameter of the underlying C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object. This likely relates to the output dimension of the model.
@property rep -> int: Gets and sets the _rep parameter of the underlying C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object. This likely relates to the number of message passing steps or repetitions.
@property is_mc -> bool: Gets and sets the is_mc flag of the underlying C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object. This likely indicates whether the model is processing Monte Carlo data.
@property res_mass -> double: Gets and sets the res_mass parameter of the underlying C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object. This likely relates to a resonance mass used in the model.
@property drop_out -> double: Gets and sets the drop_out rate of the underlying C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork object. This is a regularization parameter.

sect1.title: C++ Interaction
sect1.para:
The RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork class leverages Cython's capabilities for seamless C++ integration:
cdef class RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork: Declares RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork as a Cython extension type.
cdef recursivegraphneuralnetwork *rnn: A C++ pointer to a recursivegraphneuralnetwork object, which is the specialized C++ implementation of the RGNN model.
self.nn_ptr = self.rnn: This line demonstrates how the base ModelTemplate's C++ pointer (nn_ptr) is made to point to the specialized recursivegraphneuralnetwork object, allowing RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork to fulfill the ModelTemplate interface.
from AnalysisG.core.model_template cimport ModelTemplate: Imports the base ModelTemplate class, from which RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork inherits.
from AnalysisG.models.RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork.RecursiveGraphNeuralNetwork cimport recursivegraphneuralnetwork: Imports the C++ recursivegraphneuralnetwork class declaration from its .pxd file.
